name: Entry & Clients
description: CLI bootstrap via Application plus standalone Producer and Consumer TCP programs that register with the broker and exchange messages.

name: Broker Service
description: Central Broker that accepts TCP connections, routes typed protocol messages, and coordinates topic queues with consumer-group delivery.

name: Messaging State
description: In-memory topic aggregates, ring-buffer queues, consumer-group offsets, and broker allocation results that hold message backlog state.

name: Wire Protocol
description: Length-prefixed Message envelopes, MessageType opcodes, and binary registration payloads used between clients and the broker.

name: Shared Utilities
description: Cross-cutting constants for ports and queue limits plus standalone TCP echo demos for low-level socket experimentation.

name: Documentation
description: README build/run instructions and learning notes on nested classes and cross-platform TCP registration timing.

name: Tooling Configuration
description: Understand-Anything ignore rules that exclude build artifacts and generated analysis output from codebase scanning.
